title: New Link Boosts Community Contribution Insights

topics.title: Feature Additions
topics.summary: Recent merges include new features such as Tetris and pride noodles, enhancing user engagement. Additionally, an endpoint for embedding download charts as static SVGs has been introduced, allowing for easier integration into external websites. These features aim to improve user experience and accessibility.

topics.title: User Interface Improvements
topics.summary: Several UI fixes have been implemented, including adjustments to the mobile search field and the rendering of the license icon. These changes aim to enhance usability and ensure consistent visual representation across different browsers and devices.

topics.title: Release Management
topics.summary: The recent release of version 0.15.0 includes multiple feature enhancements and bug fixes. This update aims to improve overall functionality and user experience on the `npmx.dev` platform, ensuring that users benefit from the latest developments.

topics.title: Documentation and Links
topics.summary: A new link to the npmxers site has been added to the README, providing a centralized location for contribution statistics across all `npmx-dev` repositories. This enhances transparency and encourages community involvement by showcasing contributions effectively.

topics.title: Error Logging Enhancements
topics.summary: Improvements to error logging in the lunaria generation process have been made to aid in debugging. By enabling logs in the canary environment, developers can better understand issues that arise, facilitating quicker resolutions and enhancing overall system reliability.

topics.title: Issue Resolutions
topics.summary: Several issues have been closed, including those related to mobile search input behavior and the rendering of license icons. These resolutions reflect ongoing efforts to address user feedback and improve the platform's functionality.
